document.title: Double side Silicone & Acrylic Adhesive Tape ST-9108
document.documentType: Product technical data sheet / physical properties sheet

sourceSummary.oneLine: DAEHYUN ST ST-9108 is a transparent PET-base double-sided silicone and acrylic adhesive tape with representative physical properties and storage conditions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports material/component specification review for ST-9108 tape, but the source states the listed representative properties cannot be used as a product test report.
keyPoints: ST-9108 is described as a Polyester/PET base silicone and acrylic adhesive tape.
One side has silicone adhesive coating and the other side has acrylic adhesive coating.
Uses include silicone keypad fixing, silicone rubber attachment, and fixing various parts.
Representative physical properties include 25 um base film thickness, 100 um total tape thickness, peel strength values, elongation, tensile strength, and temperature resistance.
Storage condition is 25 C +/- 5 C and 40% +/- 20% humidity, with a six-month warranty period under storage conditions.

concepts.name: Double-sided silicone and acrylic adhesive tape
concepts.pageTarget: Double-sided silicone and acrylic adhesive tape
concepts.evidence: Double side Silicone & Acrylic Adhesive Tape ST-9108

concepts.name: Representative physical properties
concepts.evidence: 위표에 기재된 내용은 ST-9108 의 대표적인 물성을 나타내며 제품 성적서의 용도로 사용될수없습니다.

concepts.name: Peel strength testing
concepts.evidence: Peel strength A (Silicone) 1,300gf/in ASTM D 3330 B (Acrylic) 2,800gf/in ASTM D 3330

evidence.claim: ST-9108 is a double-sided silicone and acrylic adhesive tape with a Polyester/PET base.
evidence.evidenceText: DAEHYUN ST ST-9108 제품은 Polyester Base의 실리콘 & 아크릴 점착 Tape임 ... Base Film Material PET ... Type of Adhesive Silicone & Acrylic

evidence.claim: The tape structure includes a white PET release liner, acrylic PSA, PET film, silicone PSA, and PET release liner.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품구조 White PET Release Liner Acrylic PSA (30㎛) - B PET (25㎛) Silicone PSA (45㎛) - A PET Release Liner

evidence.claim: ST-9108 uses ASTM D 3652 for base film thickness and tape total thickness measurements.
evidence.evidenceText: Base film thickness 25㎛ ASTM D 3652 Tape total thickness 100㎛ ASTM D 3652

evidence.claim: ST-9108 peel strength is listed as 1,300 gf/in for silicone side A and 2,800 gf/in for acrylic side B using ASTM D 3330.
evidence.evidenceText: Peel strength A (Silicone) 1,300gf/in ASTM D 3330 B (Acrylic) 2,800gf/in ASTM D 3330

evidence.claim: ST-9108 elongation at break is listed as 120% using ASTM D 3759.
ST-9108 tensile strength is listed as 12 kg/in using ASTM D 3759.
Temperature resistance is listed as Good 180 C for silicone side A and Good 120 C for acrylic side B.
evidence.evidenceText: Temperature resistance A (Silicone) Good 180℃ B (Acrylic) Good 120℃

evidence.claim: Storage conditions are 25 C +/- 5 C and 40% +/- 20% humidity.
Warranty period is six months under the stated storage conditions.
The listed values are representative properties and cannot be used as a product test report.
evidence.evidenceText: 위표에 기재된 내용은 ST-9108 의 대표적인 물성을 나타내며 제품 성적서의 용도로 사용될수없습니다.

evidence.claim: DAEHYUN ST states its only warranty is meeting the delivery specification issued at product shipment.
evidence.evidenceText: 대현ST의 유일한 보증은 제품 출하시 발행하는 납입사양서를 만족하는데 있습니다.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Document date is not stated in the source text; a revision-like date appears only in the source filename.
Product model signals GT1717C and GT1717CP appear only in the source path, not in the document text; they were not treated as document product models.
